title: 秋華賞の後に・勝利に酔って

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How was that, Scarlet?! Looks like I'm still a level
above you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I can't believe this! How are you not more tired?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Where did all that hidden strength come from?! It
doesn't make sense...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka comes out on top. The intensity between
the two is even greater than it was back in spring.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You've really built up your stamina. I've always
known you had more than me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But now it's like ya don't get tired at all. What
kinda trainin' have you been doin'?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I just kept running. Morning, noon, and night. I
put in the most effort in the smartest way
possible.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's it? How boring...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was boring! But I did every boring thing necessary to get where I am!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's my weapon. It's something you don't have and never will.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep honing this weapon until I beat
you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...You still lost, though.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I mean in the future! This was only the first race of
the fall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Their heated exchange continues for a while...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just wait and see! The 2,500-meter Arima Kinen
at the end of the year is where I'm going to shine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins the last race of the year gets a
million points and is the winner of the entire year.
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The heck is this?! Some kinda lame quiz show?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I plan on running in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup before that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you can, run with me. I'll run against you any
day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Unless you're afraid of me, that is!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm amazed you can say that right after losing to
me. Still...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, you're on! I dunno about the Queen
Elizabeth, but I'll be at the Arima Kinen at the
end of the year to finish you off for good!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I'll be even stronger by then. See you
there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet may have lost, but she walks away
with her head held high.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This isn't so bad, eh, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I compete with her, I throw myself
completely into it and forget about everything
else.
choice_data_list: She's getting a lot stronger, though.
She's getting a lot stronger, though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I think she's starting to see it. Maybe even more
than me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, never mind, it's nothing. In any case, will ya
let me race against her in the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm gonna learn somethin' important
there. Somethin' for the future me.
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's go to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Thanks, Trainer. Man, Scarlet's always so
annoying...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I can see that she's gonna bring it this year.
And if she's bringing the heat, then I gotta answer
in kind!
